name: codex-agent-skills
description: A personal product-building operating system for Codex, spanning project setup, product discovery, prototypes, business viability, design, engineering, QA, and launch.

interface.shortDescription: Project lifecycle, product, design, business, QA, and engineering workflows for building lovable apps with Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native product-building system. The plugin keeps a small command-like entry surface while loading deeper skills for new project setup, phase/status orientation, discovery, prototypes, founder review, business-model review, design review, specs, planning, implementation, QA, health checks, launch, retro, and learning.
defaultPrompt: Use new-project to scaffold this project.
Use project-status to tell me what phase we are in.
Use prototype before we build this direction.
